stemHtml: Learning new information such as a new checklist for your aircraft can be enhanced by:

options.a: Practicing the procedure first WITHOUT reading the checklist, using the process of discovery to learn new information.
options.b: Rehearsing the use of this checklist first and practicing it (when applicable) on the aircraft.
options.c: Reading new information only during circadian rhythm peak times, thus enhancing memory retention.
options.d: Studying at the time when the sleep credit limit has been reached and the body is more alert.
